arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Leeds United vs. West Bromwich Albion
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. West Bromwich Albion.

arts.ttl: Joel Piroe issues demand to Leeds United team-mates to ensure promotion
arts.sum: Leeds United are five points clear at the top of the Championship after back-to-back comeback wins over promotion rivals Sheffield United and Sunderland

arts.ttl: Leeds United are the best in the country for vital stat, Farke says it’s “deserved”
arts.sum: Leeds United’s last two winning goals have come in the 95th and 89th minute, and their ability to score late in games is not matched by any time in the 92. Leeds the best team in the country for late goals this season

arts.ttl: Harry Gray spotted in Leeds first team training
arts.sum: Leeds United are gearing up to face West Brom at Elland Road on Saturday afternoon, in which a handful of talented youngsters have played a part in Thorp Arch preparations. Included in training were three youngsters in particular, 18-year-old goalkeeper Rory Mahady, a player that appears to be 18-year-old midfielder Rhys Chadwick, and 16-year-old forward Harry Gray:

arts.ttl: Thelwell to leave Everton amid Kinnear, Leeds links
arts.sum: Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear could be on his way to Everton in the summer, and it looks as though the Toffees are shaking up their boardroom in preparation. CEO Angus Kinnear set to join Everton at end of this season

arts.ttl: Journalist: Leeds want Struijk new deal ASAP
arts.sum: Leeds United are said to be keen on tying down star centre-back Pascal Struijk to a new contract if they secure promotion this season. As Daniel Farke looks to guide Leeds over the finish line as soon as possible, there could already be contracts in the pipeline for his star players.

arts.ttl: Top-scorer Joel Piroe has proved his Elland Road critics wrong all over again
arts.sum: After the win over Watford earlier this month, Farke said he wants Piroe to get close to 20 goals this season. His five goals in five games represents his best form this season, and at just the right time.

arts.ttl: Rothwell starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face West Brom
arts.sum: The latest Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke's side gear up to face West Bromwich Albion in the Championship. The post Rothwell starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face West Brom appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: West Brom get major fitness boost for Leeds United trip as Tony Mowbray makes Daniel James point
arts.sum: When asked about Grant at his news conference yesterday, West Brom boss Tony Mowbray said: "He's been back in training and looked good in training today. West Bromwich Albion have received a major fitness boost as they prepare to face in-form Leeds United at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Leeds United pre-season ploy pays off as Whites lead top four tiers in key area
arts.sum: United’s pre-season included a win over Valencia and perhaps was a foreshadowing of the standard Farke had wanted to instil in his players. Against both Sunderland and Sheffield United, the fitness Leeds showed when pressing and searching for the later winner reaped its reward.
